Title: J--WA -LEAVENWORTH NFH-ANNUAL PRAS SERVICE
Awardee: INTEGRATED AQUA SYSTEMS, INC. 1235 ACTIVITY DR STE A VISTA CA 92081 USA
Description: This procurement is for a firm-fixed-price sole source contract to Integrated Aqua for annual maintenance and servicing of four SITA UV400 18 TC UL ultraviolet disinfection units and three HEX X3 HP Microscreen Drum Filter units located at the Leavenworth National Fish Hatchery's partially recirculating aquaculture system pRAS. The pRAS supports the rearing of approximately 280,000 spring Chinook salmon annually and relies on continuous, specialized operation of these systems to maintain water quality and fish health. This requirement ensures proper functioning of the equipment, protects fish health, and sustains the hatcherys production objectives through timely inspections, preventive and corrective maintenance, parts replacement, and technical support.

J065--Intent to Sole Source Notification
Description: Notice of Intent to Sole-Source Requirement The Department of Veterans Affairs, Network Contracting Office (NCO) 10, intends to negotiate a sole source contract under Simplified Acquisition Procedures and the authority of FAR 6.302-1, Only one responsible source and no other supplies or services will satisfy agency requirements. The associated NAICS code for this is 811210 [NAICS Code - https://www.naics.com/search/]. The sole-source contract will be awarded to: Meisystem Inc. Description of equipment requirements: Extended Warranty and Service for Model 230158-10 Laser Edging It is the Government's belief that only the proposed candidate possesses the required capabilities to successfully meet this requirement. It is the Government's intention to solicit and negotiate with only this source. This notice of intent is not a request for competitive proposals. IAW FAR 5.207 all responsible sources may submit a capability statement, proposal, or quotation, which shall be considered by the agency. This is not a solicitation or request for offers. No solicitation package is available. Any response to this notice must show clear and convincing evidence that demonstrates the ability to comply with the requirement and that competition would be advantageous to the Government. The Government will not pay for information submitted. A determination not to compete based on responses to this notice is solely within the discretion of the Government. All responses to this intent to sole source must be emailed to Jennifer Nowak at Jennifer.Nowak@va.gov by 12:00pm EST 03/17/2026.

Title: R--ANNUAL PARCELQUEST SUBSCRIPTION RENEWAL
Awardee: CD-DATA 193 BLUE RAVINE RD STE 120 Folsom CA 95630 USA
Description: ANNUAL PARCELQUEST SUBSCRIPTION RENEWAL Bureau of Land Management (BLM) has issued a sole source award to CD-DATA for a follow-up purchase order for ParcelQuest Annual Subscription. A Justification for Other than Full and Open will be posted within 14 days of award. The award value is $27,400.00 for a base period and a total value of $137,00.00 for a base plus four option periods. 1. Identification of the agency and the contracting office. Department of Interior (DOI)-Bureau of Land Management (BLM), California State Office, Lands & Realty, Cadastral, and GIS. 2800 Cottage Way, Sacramento, CA 95825 2. Description of supply or service required to meet the agency's needs In the past BLM has used an online service that is assessable to the BLM staff located throughout California. The information provided has been "real time" county land information sourced from County Assessors that is current and provide privately owned property information. ex. land ownership, sales comp, zoning, land-use, environmental conditions, and detailed mapping, etc. This is necessary for proper research for California projects. The Contract permits 15 simultaneous user logins. Services include access to parcel data, ownership records, maps, and related property documentation to support Bureau of Land Management (BLM) California operations. 3. The rationale or circumstances for limiting competition. This vendor is a unique provider of all California County Assessor property data for all 58 counties, which is updated on monthly basis. The service provides a unique service via online platform access to county record software and mapping all throughout California. This vendor has been in business since 1995 and is the only product that gives customers the capability to search for County Assessor verified parcel boundary information through the interactive use of Google Maps, which offers aerial photography including the 45° views of roads, waterways and points of interest, USDA Soil data, FEMA Flood Zone and Cal Fire protection zones. This vendor also offers the ability to search using the Public Land Survey System (PLSS) and GPS (Lat/Lon) coordinates. The service allows for Digital parcel boundary files (shape files) to be exported for use in legacy GIS applications. 4. A description of the Market Research (MR) conducted, and the results or a statement of the reason MR was not conducted. Research was conducted on the internet for comparable services/subscriptions. Nine other businesses came up in search and did not do business with the Government. A search in the Dynamic Small Business Search under NAICS 541360 and found one vendor but they did not provide an online platform to access county record parcels and mapping throughout California.

Title: Purchase Antenna for U.S. Coast Guard Aircraft HC-144
TRICARE Claims Review Services (TCRS)
Awardee: CONCEPT PLUS, LLC Fairfax VA 22033 USA
Description: The Defense Health Agency (DHA) awarded a Firm Fixed Price (FFP) contract bridge extension for TRICARE Claims Review Services to Concept Plus on February 27, 2026 under contract HT9402-17-D-0001. The extension was issued sole-source in accordance with Federal Acquisition Regulation (RFO) 6.103-1(b), only one responsible source and no other supplies or services will satisfy agency requirements. The period of performance will be from March 01, 2026 - February 28, 2027. A bridge extension was necessary to prevent a gap in support to mission critical DHA requirements until a follow-on contract is awarded and the awardee completes transition-in. The Defense Health Agency (DHA) supports health services for more than 9.4 million beneficiaries of the Military Health System (MHS). The purpose of the TCRS contract is to assist the DHA Improper Payment Evaluation Branch (IPEB) in identifying and reporting improper payments and discrepancies in payment recording for the MHS. TCRS support provides an independent impartial review of claims processing procedures and reimbursement methodologies utilized by purchased-care contractors and assesses purchased-care contractor compliance with TRICARE policies and directives by evaluating the accuracy of claims payment and payment record coding for the MCSC, TMEP, TPharm, TOP, and ADDP contracts. TCRS helps support IBEP’s requirement to assess the potential risk of improper payments and to identify and report improper payments to the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) for publication in the Department of Defense (DoD) Agency Financial Report (AFR) pursuant to Public Laws 107-300, and the Payment Integrity Act of 2019 (PIIA), Public Laws 116-117. The total estimated value of the twelve (12) month extension is $5,230,151. Mr. Gregory Stephens is the Contracting Officer and the Defense Health Agency, Aurora, CO 80011, is the contracting activity (HT9402). Performance of this contract will be accomplished at the contractor’s facilities.

Title: TR-302D and 355 Transducer Production
Awardee: MASSA PRODUCTS CORPORATION Hingham MA 02043 USA
Description: Award of a Naval Undersea Warfare Center, Division Newport (NUWCDIVNPT) Indefinite Delivery/Indefinite Quantity contract containing Firm Fixed Price (FFP) provisions to Massa Products Corporation, Contract Number N66604-26-D-E600 on 09 March 2026. NUWCDIVNPT’s Contracts Department executed a contract award with a ceiling of $23,479,329.00 to Massa Products Corporation, in support of Code 15. The ordering period will be for a total of sixty (60) months. Fiscal Year 2025, Other Procurement, Navy (OPN) funds in the amount of $558,110.00 will be obligated at time of award on the first delivery order to satisfy the minimum guarantee. Under this contract, Massa will be required to document, manufacture, test, package, and deliver TR-302D and TR-355 Production transducers using a build-to-performance specification approach that meets the performance requirements of the TR-302D and TR-355 transducer Critical Item Performance Specification (CIPS). The spare parts, Acoustic Assembly Windows, Acoustic Windows, Receptacle Connectors, T2 and T3 Transformer Assemblies, Bulkhead Receptacle Connectors, Transformer Assembles and TR-355A Conversion Kits, are build-to-print items in accordance with the respective drawings included in the Reference Baseline drawing package.

Title: 6515--WatchPAT One Direct Program (WRJ)
Description: White River Junction VA Medical Center has awarded a firm-fixed GSA contract to Original Equipment Manufacturer large business Itamar Medical for the purchase of the WatchPAT One Direct Program through GSA contract 36F79723D0108. This determination is made under FAR 8.405-6(a)(1)(B), which permits limiting sources when only one solution can meet the Government s minimum needs for unique or highly specialized services. The VA s minimum need is not a specific device brand but a FedRAMP-authorized Somnoware workflow that supports direct-to-patient shipping, secure ingestion, and integration with VA s CPRS/Cerner systems. At present, only WatchPAT ONE Direct Services meets these requirements in VA s production environment. Implementing alternatives would require new Somnoware integration, FedRAMP authorization for associated cloud workflows, and VA security assessments processes that typically take months and introduce unacceptable delays and costs, jeopardizing continuity of care for Veterans. The VA remains committed to competitive acquisitions in the future and will consider vendors who achieve FedRAMP-authorized Somnoware integration and demonstrate operational readiness for direct-to-patient workflows.
